title: Aegis Surface Frontmatter (Lean 5-field)

source.description: Provenance string, e.g. 'anvil:skills/universal/research.md'. Required for migrated content; omit for new content.

x-aegis.description: Aegis-specific metadata namespace. Permissive (additionalProperties:true) so fields like 'stance' coexist; the optional 'pipeline' sub-schema below tightens the composition block only.

pipeline.description: Composition metadata (AG-0199). All keys optional; absence means an atomic skill. The COMPOSITION validator asserts the requires/next graph is acyclic, that every named skill exists in canonical, and that each handoff resolves to a real template kind (or carries a `// REASON:`).

requires.description: Prerequisite skills auto-invoked before this skill runs. Each MUST name a real canonical skill under its current name.

handoff.description: Named artifact passed forward to the next skill — a real template kind from manifest/template-index.json, or an artifact name justified with a `// REASON:` note.

next.description: The transition target skill this skill hands off to. MUST name a real canonical skill under its current name.

intensity.description: Skill intensity-level metadata (AG-0214), an optional extension of the x-aegis composition namespace. Absence means the skill behaves exactly as today (implicit 'full'). When present, the skill body branches per declared level. The COMPOSITION validator checks `default` and `levels` are drawn from the known set {lite, full, ultra} and that `default` is one of the declared `levels`.

default.description: The level used when the caller names none. Implicit 'full' when the intensity block is absent entirely.

levels.description: The intensity levels this skill implements. Each MUST have a matching branch in the body. `lite` trims effort; `full` is the baseline (lossless vs today); `ultra` deepens.

^x-[a-z][a-z0-9-]*$.description: Adapter or source-specific metadata namespace. Prefer x-<adapter> over new unscoped top-level keys. Examples: x-claude, x-opencode, x-anvil.

$comment: Abilities are NOT registered as skills — they live at skills/<name>/abilities/*.md with NO frontmatter (or minimal name+description). This schema applies only to registered surfaces.
